GameKey.description: A 9 digit unique code identifying the game that this record corresponds to. The GameID is composed of Season; SeasonType; Week and HomeTeam. Note: This value will be NULL for bye weeks

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this player corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 4=Offseason; 5=All-Star)

Season.description: The NFL season of the game

Week.description: The NFL week of the game (regular season: 1 to 18; preseason: 0 to 4; postseason: 1 to 4). Note: seasons after 2021 will have only 3 preseason weeks

Date.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

Opponent.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the opponent team

PointsAllowed.description: Total points allowed by the team during the game

TouchdownsScored.description: Total defensive and special teams touchdowns scored by the team in the game

SoloTackles.description: Total defensive solo (unassisted) tackles by the team in the game

AssistedTackles.description: Total defensive assisted tackles by the team in the game

Sacks.description: Total defensive sacks by the team in the game

SackYards.description: Total defensive sack yards by the team in the game

PassesDefended.description: Total passes defended by the team in the game

FumblesForced.description: Total fumbles forced on defense by the team in the game

FumblesRecovered.description: Total defensive fumble recoveries by the team in the game

FumbleReturnYards.description: Total fumble return yards by the team in the game

FumbleReturnTouchdowns.description: Total fumble return touchdowns by the team in the game

Interceptions.description: Total defensive interceptions by the team in the game

InterceptionReturnYards.description: Total defensive interception return yards by the team in the game

InterceptionReturnTouchdowns.description: Total defensive interception return touchdowns by the team in the game

BlockedKicks.description: Total blocked kicks by team in the game. Note: BlockedKicks include Field Goals and Punts but NOT Extra Points

Safeties.description: Total defensive safeties scored by the team in the game

PuntReturns.description: Total punt returns by the team in the game

PuntReturnYards.description: Total punt return yards by the team in the game

PuntReturnTouchdowns.description: Total punt return touchdowns by the team in the game

PuntReturnLong.description: The longest punt return by the team in the game

KickReturns.description: Total kickoff returns by the team in the game

KickReturnYards.description: Total kickoff return yards by the team in the game

KickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total kickoff return touchdowns by the team in the game

KickReturnLong.description: Longest kick return by the team in the game

BlockedKickReturnTouchdowns.description: Total blocked kick recovery return touchdowns for the team in the game

FieldGoalReturnTouchdowns.description: Total field goal return touchdowns by the team in the game. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

FantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the season. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

QuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing quarterbacks by the team in the game

RunningbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total fantasy points allowed to opposing running backs by the team in the game

WideReceiverFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing wide receivers

TightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opposing tight ends by the team in the game

KickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Fantasy points allowed to opponent kickers by the team in the game

BlockedKickReturnYards.description: Total blocked kick recovery return yards for the team in the game

FieldGoalReturnYards.description: Total field goal return yards by the team in the game. Note: This field excludes blocked field goals

QuarterbackHits.description: Total quarterback hits by the team in the game. Note: This is a defensive stat that includes sacks

TacklesForLoss.description: Total tackles for loss by the team in the game. Note: These are tackles behind the line of scrimmage for loss of yards (including sacks)

DefensiveTouchdowns.description: Total touchdowns scored by the defense

SpecialTeamsTouchdowns.description: Total special teams touchdowns scored by the team in the game

FantasyPoints.description: Fantasy points scored based on basic fantasy scoring system by the team's D/ST in the game

Humidity.description: The humidity percentage at the start of the game

WindSpeed.description: The wind speed at the start of the game (in MPH)

ThirdDownAttempts.description: Total third down attempts against the team in the game

ThirdDownConversions.description: Total third down conversions against the team in the game

FourthDownAttempts.description: Opponent's fourth down attempts against the team in the game

FourthDownConversions.description: Opponent's fourth down conversions against the team in the game

PointsAllowedByDefenseSpecialTeams.description: Total number of points allowed by the team in the game to the opposing offense and special teams. Note: This field excludes points scored by the opponent's defense

FanDuelSalary.description: The team's D/ST salary for FanDuel daily fantasy contests

DraftKingsSalary.description: The team's D/ST salary for DraftKings daily fantasy contests.

FantasyDataSalary.description: The team's D/ST salary as calculated by SportsDataIO (formerly known as FantasyData). Based on the same salary cap as DraftKings contests ($50,000)

VictivSalary.description: The player's salary for Victiv daily fantasy contests.

TwoPointConversionReturns.description: Total successful two point conversion returns by the team in the game

FantasyPointsFanDuel.description: Fantasy points based on FanDuel's scoring system by the team in the game

FantasyPointsDraftKings.description: Fantasy points based on DraftKings' scoring system by the team in the game

OffensiveYardsAllowed.description: Offensive yards allowed by the team's defense in the game

YahooSalary.description: The player's salary for Yahoo daily fantasy contests

PlayerID.description: The unique PlayerID of the player as assigned by SportsDataIO for use when combining with player feeds. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their entire career

FantasyPointsYahoo.description: Fantasy points based on Yahoo's daily fantasy scoring system by the team in the game

HomeOrAway.description: Whether the team is home or away

OpponentRank.description: The ranking of the opposing team's offense with regards to fantasy points allowed to fantasy DST

OpponentPositionRank.description: The ranking of the opposing team's offense with regards to fantasy points allowed to fantasy DST

FantasyDraftSalary.description: The team's D/ST salary for FantasyDraft daily fantasy contests.

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team

OpponentID.description: The unique ID of this opponent team

Day.description: The date of the game (in US Eastern Time)

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game (in US Eastern Time)

GlobalGameID.description: A globally unique ID for this game. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalOpponentID.description: A globally unique ID for this team's opponent. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

DraftKingsPosition.description: The position of this team's D/ST; as listed by DraftKings.

FanDuelPosition.description: The position of this team's D/ST; as listed by FanDuel.

FantasyDraftPosition.description: The position of this team's D/ST; as listed by FantasyDraft

YahooPosition.description: The position of the team's defense/special teams unit, as listed on Yahoo's daily fantasy sports platform

FantasyDefenseID.description: "Unique ID of FantasyDefense record (subject to change; although it very rarely does).  Note: For a guaranteed static ID; use a combination of GameKey and Team"

FanDuelFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the game. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

FanDuelQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing quarterbacks in the game

FanDuelRunningbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing running backs in the game

FanDuelWideReceiverFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing wide receivers in the game

FanDuelTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing tight ends in the game

FanDuelKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FanDuel fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing kickers in the game

DraftKingsFantasyPointsAllowed.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the game. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

DraftKingsQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowe.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent quarterbacks in the game

DraftKingsRunningbackFantasyPointsAllowe.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent running backs in the game

DraftKingsWideReceiverFantasyPointsAllow.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent wide receivers in the game

DraftKingsTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed by the team to opponent tight ends in the game

DraftKingsKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: DraftKings fantasy points allowed to opposing kickers

YahooFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players by the team in the game. Note: Offensive players include: QB, RB, WR, & TE

YahooQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing quarterbacks by the team in the game

YahooRunningbackFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing running backs by the team in the game

YahooWideReceiverFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing wide receivers by the team in the game

YahooTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing tight ends by the team in the game

YahooKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: Total Yahoo fantasy points allowed to opposing kickers by the team in the game

FantasyPointsFantasyDraft.description: Fantasy points based on FantasyDraft's scoring system by the team in the game

FantasyDraftFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed to opposing offensive players in the game. Note: positions include: QB; RB; WR; TE

FantasyDraftQuarterbackFantasyPointsAllo.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing quarterbacks in the game

FantasyDraftRunningbackFantasyPointsAllo.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing running backs in the game

FantasyDraftWideReceiverFantasyPointsAll.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing wide receivers in the game

FantasyDraftTightEndFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing tight ends in the game

FantasyDraftKickerFantasyPointsAllowed.description: FantasyDraft fantasy points allowed by the team to opposing kickers in the game

ScoringDetails.description: The details of the scoring plays this team DST recorded in the game
